blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
